parameters.i2i_prompt: Create a high-end editorial "Color Analysis Board" from this portrait in a luxury fashion magazine style (Dior / Ralph Lauren aesthetic). Clean beige/ivory background, warm tones, soft diffused lighting, ultra-detailed photorealistic, minimal elegant typography, grid-based layout. Main portrait centered with enhanced natural beauty (same identity). Panels: Your Best Colors (fabric swatches), Undertone (warm/neutral/cool), Colors to Avoid, Neutrals that Work, Prints that Flatter, Makeup guide (eyeshadow/blush/lips/highlighter), You in Your Colors (outfit variations), Hair colors, Jewelry, Style notes, Capsule wardrobe (outfits/shoes/bags).
